## Summary

What does this PR add or change?

## Type

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] New agent
- [ ] Improvement to existing skill/agent
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Bug fix

## Testing

- [ ] Tested the skill/agent in Claude Code on a real project
- [ ] Verified cross-platform (or noted platform-specific behavior)

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows conventions in [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Preflight checks included (for skills)
- [ ] Error handling is explicit (not left to the agent to guess)
- [ ] No hardcoded model names
- [ ] Temp files go in `.review/`
